description: A 1:1 replica of Claude Desktop's computer-use tool surface, for Windows and the Claude Code CLI.
name: io.github.Jason26214/omni-computer-use

environmentVariables.description: Max pixels in a downscaled screenshot (default 1200000, ~1.2 MP).
environmentVariables.name: COMPUTER_USE_MAX_PIXELS

environmentVariables.description: Mask non-allowlisted app windows in screenshots ('on'/'off', default off).
environmentVariables.name: COMPUTER_USE_MASKING

environmentVariables.description: Block input when the frontmost app is not allowlisted ('on'/'off', default off).
environmentVariables.name: COMPUTER_USE_ENFORCE_FOREGROUND

environmentVariables.description: Register the reload hot-reload developer tool ('on'/'off', default off).
environmentVariables.name: COMPUTER_USE_DEV
